title: Realism+
description:
Fabric modpack which has a tone of optimisation mods to improve your FPS with cool shaders and plenty of cool mods including origins and mob morphing with abilities.
Would recommend adding bettervillages,biomes0plenty,libraryferret,serene seasons with this
body:
Minecraft modpack with cool mods such as shaders and ability mods give it a try and it will be updated with better versions. First person mode. xaeros minimap. Origins. Falling tree. Photon shaders. Player animations. Frostiful. Shrimple shaders. Distant horizons. Scorchful. Veinminer. 3D skin layers. And more+ any new mods added in future description will be updated report to discord for bugs.

Fabric 1.21.1
